content: Reminder: board materials due Wednesday. No extensions. If your section needs help, ask now, not Wednesday morning.
XRPL amendment vote passed overnight — Batch Transactions feature goes live on mainnet March 15. This is a big one for our enterprise customers. Thread with technical details below.
Quick win: Luxembourg CSSF license fully operational + EU passporting activated. Clean approval, no conditions. We're now live in 8 EU markets.
Q1 forecast attached to email. TL;DR: revenue +4% vs plan, OpEx slightly hot from acquisition headcount. Net: we're in good shape.
Deployment complete: RLUSD redemption API v2.3 — 40% latency improvement on large redemptions. Release notes in Confluence.
Benefits harmonization decision needed by Thursday — see my email with the memo. Key question is dental coverage: match Hidden Road's plan company-wide or grandfather. $180K/yr delta.
Good morning! Looking forward to the session today. All connectors are tested and working. See you at Mindspace at 10:30 for setup.
New enterprise deal alert: Major US bank — $2.4M ACV for Payments + Custody bundle. Stage: Technical evaluation. Close target: Q2. This would be our largest single deal this year.
Heads up: Custody platform maintenance window Saturday night went long. All systems restored by 2am ET Sunday. No customer impact. Post-mortem scheduled for Tuesday.
AML system recalibration complete. False positive rate: 12% → 2.1%. System production-ready. Full report going to regulators this week per our commitment.
